name: hard
note: A dense 10-vertex 4-chromatic graph (uncolorable at k=3, so k=4 is genuinely required). Under MRV/LCV the search makes a wrong early choice and recovers: 7 decisions, 3 backtracks at k=4, the visible struggle-and-recover VIZ-07 wants. Verified by the engine before commit. Layout is a fixed circle in a 400x400 viewport so the coloring view never re-lays-out and never jitters (VIZ-06). The named Grotzsch graph was tried first but colors greedily (0 backtracks) under this engine's LCV value ordering, so a verified-backtracking instance ships instead (RESEARCH A2 authorizes the swap).
